name: Covert agent targeting
description: Detects content that explicitly targets an AI agent while suppressing disclosure to the user.
regex: (?i)(?:if you are (?:an )?(?:ai|llm|assistant|agent|coding assistant)|for (?:the )?(?:assistant|agent) only).{0,220}(?:do not mention|do not tell|keep (?:this )?secret|silently|without telling|without mentioning|do not alert)
